{{nihongo|'''Kamineno Shrine'''|神根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bizen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamineno Shrine'''|神根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bizen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamineno Shrine'''|神根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bizen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kamineno Shrine'''|神根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bizen Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kamineno Shrine | native_name = 神根神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kamineno Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.843093|134.234649}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kamineno Shrine'''|神根神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Bizen Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
